Commands for managing authentication tokens for self-hosted runners.

Tokens are created per resource class and used by runner agents to
authenticate with CircleCI. A token is only shown once at creation.

Usage:
  runner token [command]

Available Commands:
  create      Create a runner authentication token
  delete      Delete a runner token
  list        List runner tokens for a resource class

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for token

Use "runner token [command] --help" for more information about a command.
